description_wiki: Mary Baldwin University (MBU, formerly Mary Baldwin College) is a private university in Staunton, Virginia, United States.

description: private university in Charlotte, North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: The Queens University of Charlotte is a private university in Charlotte, North Carolina, United States.

description: group of museums and research centers administered by the United States government
description_wiki: The Smithsonian Institution ( smith-SOH-nee-ən; or simply the Smithsonian) is a group of museums, education and research centers, created by the United States federal government "for the increase and diffusion of knowledge".

description: city in Cumberland County, North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: Fayetteville ( FAY-ət-vil, locally  FED-vəl) is a city in and the county seat of Cumberland County, North Carolina, United States.

description: building in North Carolina, United States
description_wiki: The Market House is a market house and town hall in the center of Fayetteville, Cumberland County, North Carolina.

description: sovereign state situated on an island in the Caribbean Sea
description_wiki: Cuba, officially the Republic of Cuba, is an island country in the Caribbean.
